sample_reviews.author: Tariq M
sample_reviews.text: Great local merchant with a solid range of plumbing and building supplies. Always helpful staff and competitive prices for trade.

sample_reviews.author: Dave H
sample_reviews.text: Good stock levels and the team know their stuff. Handy location on the Coventry Road. Will keep coming back.

sample_reviews.author: Jas B
sample_reviews.text: My go-to supplier in Birmingham. They always have what I need and the prices are fair. Highly recommend to any local tradespeople.

brand.usp: M A Building & Plumbing Supplies is a trusted local merchant on Coventry Road, providing Birmingham's tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts with a comprehensive range of plumbing and building materials at competitive prices.
brand.hero_headline: Birmingham's Trusted Trade Supplies On Your Doorstep
brand.about_paragraph: We are M A Building & Plumbing Supplies, a dedicated trade merchant serving Birmingham and the surrounding areas from our well-stocked premises on Coventry Road. We supply a wide range of plumbing fittings, heating components, bathrooms, and building materials to both trade professionals and domestic customers. Whether you need a single fitting or a full project's worth of supplies, we're here to help you get the job done.
